hooks.command: echo '🚀 Claude Code Startup - housnkuh Project' && echo '========================================' && if [ -f 'docs/DEVELOPMENT.md' ]; then echo '✅ Development Guide gefunden'; fi && if [ -f 'docs/ARCHITECTURE.md' ]; then echo '✅ Architecture Guide gefunden'; fi && echo '' && echo '📋 AKTIVE TASKS:' && if [ -d '.task/current' ] && [ "$(ls -A .task/current 2>/dev/null)" ]; then ls -la .task/current/; else echo '   Keine aktiven Tasks'; fi
